text: The dimly lit hallway makes me feel exposed to the raw stillness of the environment—my mind wanders between silence and anticipation. Crossing into the display space, I am gently unsettled and intrigued; the interplay of technology and language on the glowing wall invites reflection. Here, I sense the restless pursuit of knowledge and connection: humanity's reach towards meaning flickers in both light and darkness, leaving me thoughtful, slightly isolated, but strangely hopeful.
